::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### [<img src='Published/bayesian_inference/bayesian_inference.gif' width='40' style='vertical-align: middle; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 8px;'/>ベイズ推論](Published/bayesian_inference/1.md)

:::



::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### [<img src='Published/equilibrium_stat_mech/equilibrium_stat_mech.jpg' width='40' style='vertical-align: middle; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 8px;'/>平衡系統計力学](Published/equilibrium_stat_mech/1.md)

:::



::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### [<img src='Published/information_geometry/information_geometry.jpg' width='40' style='vertical-align: middle; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 8px;'/>情報幾何学](Published/information_geometry/1.md)

:::



::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

### <img src='Published/optimization_math/optimization_math.jpg' width='40' style='vertical-align: middle; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 8px;'/>最適化数学 (記事なし)

:::



:::
